personalInfo.name: SANKETH K KOTTARY
personalInfo.title: Aspiring Software Engineer
personalInfo.summary: Aspiring Software Engineer focused on backend development and cloud technologies, with experience in Java, SQL, Spring Boot, and AWS. Built RESTful APIs and database-integrated platforms, including a Top 5 national-levelhackathon finalist project. Seeking to contribute to teams building reliable, high-performance software systems.

experience.role: Android App Development Using GenAI Intern
responsibilities: Developing 2+ Android application modules using Kotlin and Android Studio with modular architecture.
Contributing across 3+ phases of the development life-cycle including planning, implementation, testing, and review.
Gained hands-on experience with GitHub for version control, collaboration, and project management.

education.degree: B.E. in Computer Science and Business Systems

projects.name: CHATUR – Rural Empowerment Platform
points: Extracted and structured 300+ government scheme records across 12+ categories using Selenium and BeautifulSoup.
Integrated a multilingual RAG-based AI pipeline improving contextual response relevance for 50+ user queries.
Built a digital marketplace module supporting 50+ product listings with real-time synchronization for users.
Configured Firebase backend services handling authentication, job postings, and real-time updates for 100+ records.

projects.name: TickIt – Task Management Application
points: Architected a layered Controller–Service–Repository structure across 5+ service components using Spring Boot.
Designed and exposed 3+ RESTful endpoints with role-based authentication for secure task operations.
Managed 500+ task records through optimized JPA-based persistence with relational MySQL schema design.
Reduced average API response time by 10% through query optimization and database indexing strategies.

projects.name: AWS Portfolio Website CI/CD Deployment
points: Deployed a static portfolio website using Amazon S3 static hosting with public access for 1+ production instance.
Built a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions deploying updates within 10–15 seconds after code push to main .
Configured AWS IAM users, access keys, and bucket policies with 2+ permission rules for automated deployment
Automated file synchronization using GitHub Actions and AWS S3 Sync for deployment of 5+ static website files.

certifications.name: Salesforce Agentblazer Innovator 2026
certifications.details: Specialized in Agentic AI concepts and created an AI-powered service agent using Salesforce Agentforce to automate customer query resolution and business workflows.

certifications.name: Google Cybersecurity Professional Certificate
certifications.details: Gained foundational knowledge in cybersecurity principles, network security, threat detection, risk assessment, and industry-standard security practices.

achievements: Secured a Top 5 Finalist position at a National-Level Hackathon (R.V. College, Bangalore, 2024), earning a sponsored Generative AI workshop from Intel India.
